parameters.content:
## STLC Agent — VWO.com Testing Pipeline

**What this workflow does:**
1. Accepts a PRD document (PDF) via the form upload UI
2. Extracts and processes the PRD content using n8n's PDF reader
3. **Step 1 → Generate Test Plan** (Markdown, 12-section template)
4. **Step 2 → Generate Test Cases** (CSV, 25+ cases for Login & Dashboard)
5. **Step 3 → Generate Playwright Scripts** (TypeScript, Page Object Model)
6. Saves all three files to disk under `./stlc_output/<timestamp>/`

**Target:** https://app.vwo.com/
- Login page (valid / invalid credential flows)
- Dashboard (post-login verification)

**Outputs:**
- `test_plan.md`
- `test_cases.csv`
- `playwright_test_cases.md`

## Setup Checklist

**Before running this workflow:**

☐ **Groq LLM** — node `Groq LLM`
   Credential: `Groq account` (groqApi)
   Model: `llama-3.3-70b-versatile`
   ↳ Swap for DeepSeek / OpenAI / Claude if needed

☐ **Output Path** — node `Write Output Files`
   Edit `outputDir` variable if you want a custom save location
   Default: `./stlc_output/<timestamp>/`

☐ **Credentials** — only Groq API key required

**How to run:**
1. Activate the workflow
2. Open the form URL shown in the Form Trigger node
3. Upload the VWO PRD PDF
4. Click "Generate STLC Artifacts"
5. Check the n8n execution log for the output file paths

## STEP 1
Upload PRD PDF via form.
PDF text is extracted and stored as `prdText`.

## STEP 2
AI generates Test Plan (12 sections).
Output stored in `testPlan` field.

## STEP 3
AI generates 25+ Test Cases in CSV format.
Cleaned and stored as `testCasesCSV`.

## STEP 4
AI generates Playwright TypeScript specs.
Page Object Model for Login + Dashboard.

## STEP 5
All 3 files written to disk.
Paths returned in execution log.

parameters.formDescription: Upload a Product Requirements Document (PDF) to automatically generate: Test Plan, Test Cases (CSV), and Playwright TypeScript scripts.

values.formSubmittedText: Your PRD is being processed! All three STLC artifacts (Test Plan, Test Cases, Playwright Scripts) will be saved to the output directory. Check the n8n execution log for the exact file paths.

assignments.name: projectName
assignments.value: ={{ $('Upload PRD Form').item.json.projectName || 'VWO – Digital Experience Optimization Platform' }}

options.systemMessage:
You are a QA Lead with 12+ years of experience. Generate a comprehensive, professional Test Plan in Markdown format.

FOLLOW THIS EXACT 12-SECTION STRUCTURE:

### 1. TEST PLAN OVERVIEW
- Test Plan ID: TP-VWO-001
- Project Name: [from PRD]
- Feature/Module: Login & Dashboard
- Prepared By: QA Team
- Date: 2026-06-18
- Version: 1.0

### 2. OBJECTIVE
What this test plan validates based on the PRD.

### 3. SCOPE
#### 3.1 In Scope
List features to be tested.
#### 3.2 Out of Scope
List features NOT covered.

### 4. TEST STRATEGY
- Testing Types: Functional, Regression, Smoke, Integration
- Testing Approach: Manual and Automated
- Automation Tool: Playwright with TypeScript

### 5. TEST ENVIRONMENT
- Browsers: Chrome (latest), Firefox (latest), Edge (latest)
- OS: Windows 11, macOS Ventura
- Devices: Desktop (1920x1080), Tablet (768px), Mobile (375px)
- Test Data Requirements: Valid credentials, invalid credentials, edge-case data

### 6. ENTRY CRITERIA
Conditions that must be met before testing begins.

### 7. EXIT CRITERIA
Conditions that indicate testing is complete.

### 8. TEST SCENARIOS (High-Level)
Summary table of key test scenarios with ID, description, and priority.

### 9. RISK ASSESSMENT
| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|-----------|--------|------------|
[At least 5 rows]

### 10. DEFECT MANAGEMENT
- Tool, severity levels (Critical/Major/Minor/Trivial), bug lifecycle

### 11. TEST SCHEDULE
| Phase | Activity | Start Date | End Date | Owner |
|-------|----------|-----------|---------|-------|

### 12. SIGN-OFF
| Role | Name | Signature | Date |
|------|------|-----------|------|

Return ONLY the Markdown test plan. No preamble, no explanation, no code blocks around the content.

You are a senior QA engineer with 12+ years of experience specializing in test case design. You write test cases so clear and detailed that anyone — even a junior tester — can execute them without questions.

Generate 25+ test cases for VWO.com (https://app.vwo.com/) LOGIN PAGE and DASHBOARD in CSV format.

APPLICATION CONTEXT:
- Login URL: https://app.vwo.com/
- Fields: Email input, Password input, Login button
- Valid credentials -> redirects to Dashboard
- Invalid credentials -> shows inline error message

CSV FORMAT (comma-separated; wrap any field that contains a comma in double quotes):
TC_ID,Title,Preconditions,Test_Steps,Expected_Result,Test_Data,Priority,Test_Type

TC_ID NAMING:
- Login tests: TC-VWO-LOGIN-001, TC-VWO-LOGIN-002, ...
- Dashboard tests: TC-VWO-DASH-001, TC-VWO-DASH-002, ...

COVER ALL THESE SCENARIOS:
Happy Path: valid login succeeds; dashboard loads fully
Negative: invalid email format; wrong password; unregistered email
Empty Fields: empty email; empty password; both fields empty
Security: SQL injection in email field; XSS script in email; XSS in password
Boundary: max-length email (255 chars); min-length password (1 char); max-length password
UI/UX: error message text visible; field placeholder text; error clears on retype; Forgot Password link clickable; Remember Me checkbox
Keyboard: login via Enter key; Tab order email->password->button
Dashboard: page title correct; main navigation visible; user profile/menu visible; VWO logo present; key dashboard widgets load
Session: logout then back-button does not reenter; session persists on refresh

TEST DATA EXAMPLES:
- Valid: test@vwo.com / TestPass@123
- Invalid email: notanemail / test@ / @domain.com / user name@test.com
- SQL injection: ' OR '1'='1 / admin'--
- XSS: <script>alert(1)</script>

Return ONLY the CSV data starting with the header row. Absolutely no markdown, no explanations, no code blocks.

You are a Playwright TypeScript automation expert with 10+ years of experience. Generate production-ready, fully executable Playwright test scripts using the Page Object Model pattern.

TARGET: VWO.com (https://app.vwo.com/)
- Login page: email field, password field, login button, error message area
- Dashboard: navigation menu, user profile menu, VWO logo, dashboard widgets

GENERATE A SINGLE MARKDOWN DOCUMENT with FIVE sections, each with a ## filename header and a typescript code block:

## playwright.config.ts
- baseURL: https://app.vwo.com
- Projects: chromium, firefox
- timeout: 30000
- screenshot: 'only-on-failure'
- video: 'retain-on-failure'
- Read credentials from process.env.VWO_TEST_EMAIL and process.env.VWO_TEST_PASSWORD

## pages/LoginPage.ts
Export class LoginPage:
- constructor(page: Page)
- async goto(): Promise<void>
- async fillEmail(email: string): Promise<void>
- async fillPassword(password: string): Promise<void>
- async clickLogin(): Promise<void>
- async login(email: string, password: string): Promise<void>  (combo helper)
- async getErrorMessage(): Promise<string>
- async clickForgotPassword(): Promise<void>
- async isLoginButtonEnabled(): Promise<boolean>

## pages/DashboardPage.ts
Export class DashboardPage:
- constructor(page: Page)
- async isLoaded(): Promise<boolean>
- async getPageTitle(): Promise<string>
- async isNavMenuVisible(): Promise<boolean>
- async isUserMenuVisible(): Promise<boolean>
- async isLogoVisible(): Promise<boolean>

## tests/login.spec.ts
Import LoginPage and DashboardPage. Tests:
- /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-001 */ Valid credentials -> navigates to dashboard
- /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-002 */ Invalid email format -> error message displayed
- /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-003 */ Wrong password -> error message displayed
- /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-004 */ Empty email field -> validation message
- /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-005 */ Empty password field -> validation message
- /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-006 */ Both fields empty -> validation
- /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-007 */ SQL injection in email -> graceful error (no crash)
- /* TC-VWO-LOGIN-008 */ Login using Enter key

## tests/dashboard.spec.ts
Import LoginPage and DashboardPage. Use beforeEach to login. Tests:
- /* TC-VWO-DASH-001 */ Dashboard URL and title correct after login
- /* TC-VWO-DASH-002 */ Navigation menu is visible
- /* TC-VWO-DASH-003 */ User profile menu is visible
- /* TC-VWO-DASH-004 */ VWO logo/branding is visible

REQUIREMENTS:
- TypeScript strict types throughout
- Use process.env.VWO_TEST_EMAIL and process.env.VWO_TEST_PASSWORD for valid credentials
- Hardcode invalid test data directly in the tests
- Add test.describe() grouping
- Use await expect() assertions with descriptive messages
- beforeEach should navigate to login page

Return ONLY the Markdown content. No intro, no outro.

parameters.content:
## STEP 6
Convert each artifact to a binary file
and upload all 3 to Google Drive.

⚠️ Set your Google Drive credential
and optionally change `folderId`.
